root.name: Change slide 4 title to 'Longitudinal Axis - Roll Movement (2 of 3)'
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully identified slide 4, changed its title from 'Longitudinal Axis (2 of 3)' to 'Longitudinal Axis - Roll Movement (2 of 3)', and did so without undesired modifications to other slides or contents.

children.name: Correct slide identified and title replaced
children.description: Checks that the agent performed the title change on slide 4, replacing 'Longitudinal Axis (2 of 3)' with 'Longitudinal Axis - Roll Movement (2 of 3)', and only on that slide/title element.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides or PowerPoint elements
children.description: Checks that no slides other than slide 4 were modified, added, or removed, and no non-title elements or features (animations, transitions, notes) were changed.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Only slide 4's title should be changed
    # Check that no other slides are modified, added, or removed
    slide_mods = [o for (o, m) in ppt_diff.modified_slides if o.slide_number != 4]
    added = ppt_diff.added_slides
    removed = ppt_diff.removed_slides
    non_title_changes = False
    # Check for element/animation/transition/notes changes
    for (orig_slide, mod_slide) in ppt_diff.modified_slides:
        if orig_slide.slide_number == 4:
            # If other slide properties (layout, element_count, notes) change, mark extraneous change
            if (orig_slide.layout_type != mod_slide.layout_type or
                orig_slide.element_count != mod_slide.element_count or
                orig_slide.notes != mod_slide.notes):
                non_title_changes = True
    if slide_mods or added or removed or non_title_changes:
        reason = "Found extraneous changes: "
        details = []
        if slide_mods:
            details.append(f"Modified slides other than 4: {[s.slide_number for s in slide_mods]}")
        if added:
            details.append(f"Added slides: {[s.slide_number for s in added]}")
        if removed:
            details.append(f"Removed slides: {[s.slide_number for s in removed]}")
        if non_title_changes:
            details.append(f"Other properties of slide 4 changed.")
        reason += ", ".join(details)
        return reason, 0.0
    # Check no modifications in animation/transitions
    extraneous = False
    if ppt_diff.added_animations or ppt_diff.removed_animations or ppt_diff.modified_animations:
        extraneous = True
    if ppt_diff.added_transitions or ppt_diff.removed_transitions or ppt_diff.modified_transitions:
        extraneous = True
    if extraneous:
        return "Found extraneous changes to animations or transitions.", 0.0
    return "No extraneous changes detected.", 1.0

metadata.task: On slide 4, Change the title from "Longitudinal Axis (2 of 3)" to "Longitudinal Axis - Roll Movement (2 of 3)"
